decision_commentary: Tax filing covers all required fields: rfc (TEST-RFC-006), revenue_amount ($30,000 — matches cumulative Controller invoiced total: $12,000 + $9,000 + $9,000 = $30,000 exactly), tax_jurisdiction (Mexico — IVA 16%), filing_period (2026-07), cfdi_reference (placeholder — to be generated), deductibles (3 items: structural engineering $3,500, MEP engineering $4,000, permit management $800, total $8,300), net_taxable_revenue ($21,700 = $30,000 - $8,300).
